allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vulns=d.get\('vulnerabilities',{}\); [print\(k, v.get\('severity'\), v.get\('via',[{}]\)[0].get\('title',''\) if isinstance\(v.get\('via',[{}]\)[0],dict\) else ''\) for k,v in vulns.items\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('astro:', p.dependencies.astro\); console.log\('@astrojs/tailwind:', p.dependencies['@astrojs/tailwind']\); console.log\('tailwindcss:', p.dependencies.tailwindcss\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const v=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Latest tailwind adapter:', v[v.length-1]\)")
